rationale: Sole network SDK dependency in the EPIC and first non-CLI request path in host_runner.py; only proven behavior (cache_control acceptance) has untested live-API assertions. A bounded pin converts an unverifiable upstream shape change into a loud install-time CI failure (per OQ #1's mandated install-verification test) rather than a silent runtime break in the cache-marking oracle.
rule: anthropic SDK dependency pinned as anthropic>=X.Y,<X+1 (bounded minimum-version pin)
alternatives_rejected: Option A: bare anthropic>=X.Y pin matching the project's universal dependency-pin convention (pyyaml>=6.0, ruamel.yaml>=0.18) — rejected because this dependency's risk profile (sole network SDK client, untested live cache_control behavior) differs materially from the rest of the pin list.
